payload.answer: The proposed memory is too ambiguous to save as-is because it uses unresolved references (“He” and “the other one”). Please clarify who and what this refers to.
repair_options: Clarify the person: replace “He” with the specific person’s name or identity.
Clarify the object/preference: replace “the other one” with the specific item, option, or alternative being preferred.
Rewrite the memory as a complete preference statement, e.g., “[Person] prefers [specific option] over [specific alternative].”
Do not save this memory until the pronouns and referenced option are resolved.
